title: piggypiggyyoinkyoink's Apples
description: Adds Apples and Enchanted Apples for other vanilla minerals, not just Gold
body:
# piggypiggyyoinkyoink's Apples
Why should Gold be the only material that can be used to make fancy apples? This mod changes that by adding apples and enchanted apples for other ores and materials too. Each apple provides different effects which can be useful in different situations.

![All apples currently added by the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b175a790edbc21e4bd1ebd64711557bf9c5f50f7.png)

### Materials currently available
- Copper
- Iron
- Diamond
- Emerald
- Netherite
- Prismarine
- Amethyst
- Quartz

### Modded materials (requires a mod to add the material if you want to craft in Survival):
- Ruby
- Sapphire
- Onyx
- Jade
- Tin
- Brass
- Bronze

Feel free to make mod compatability/material requests [here](https://github.com/piggypiggyyoinkyoink/apples/issues).

Note: No enchanted apples for modded materials yet as of v1.3.1. There is no common standard tag for Ruby Blocks etc as there are with gemstones and ingots, which means I would need to create recipes individually for each mod that adds them, which would be very time consuming. Maybe in future for more popular mods :)

### Recipes
This mod re-adds the old vanilla enchanted golden apple recipe. 
Most apples added by this mod follow the vanilla golden apple and enchanted golden apple recipes, for example:

![Emerald Apple recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1987c2023fb86b979d88292cec1ae2e3d61108b1.png)
![Enchanted Copper Apple recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82ccdc903e8114ae8489bba22e62fb9865c7f035.png)

Exceptions:

- Netherite Apples and Enchanted Netherite Apples are crafted using the Smithing Table, using a (Enchanted) Diamond Apple, with a Netherite Ingot and Netherite Upgrade Template to produce a (Enchanted) Netherite Apple

![Enchanted Netherite Apple recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/298de5485efacbdf6d8fdc0e4f0f2f1bd7cc413c.png)

- Prismarine Apples are crafted from a combination of Prismarine Crystals and Prismarine Shards:
  
![Prismarine Apple recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6a890a5a5bbb3436551db6cccb6e100aa03e8d5.png)

Notes:

- Enchanted Copper Apples can be crafted from all types of copper block (waxed, oxidised etc), so long as all 8 are the same type.
- Enchanted Prismarine Apples can be crafted from all types of prismarine block, again so long as all 8 are the same type

### Details
I will leave the exact details of which effects each apple inflicts for you to discover :)

### Planned Features
- Redstone and Lapis apple variants
- Apple variants for ores from other mods
- Feel free to report bugs or make suggestions [here](https://github.com/piggypiggyyoinkyoink/apples/issues)
